title: Frame Log Line
description: One object per line in frames.jsonl. Sampled by default every 30 frames plus every frame on which a notable event occurred.

reason.description: Why this frame was logged. 'sampled' = periodic sample; 'event' = forced log due to notable events. Optional; default 'sampled'.

events.description: Counts of engine events that occurred on this frame, grouped by GameEvent case name. Absent or empty for quiet sampled frames.

event_details.description: Optional per-event details for frames on which notable events occurred. Empty or absent for sampled quiet frames. Consumed by post-hoc analysis when frame-granular reconstruction is needed; also supports SC-002 (operator can identify specific events from the run directory without reading source code).

actor_id.description: Attacker, builder, or other acting unit id. Optional.

detail.description: Short free-text description such as 'commander destroyed by unit 12' — one line, no newlines.

units.description: Count of friendly units known to GameState at this frame.

enemies.description: Count of enemy units known to GameState at this frame.

commands_out.description: Count of AICommands the bot sent in response to this frame. Absent if zero.
